component.name: SculptLite
component.summary: Sculpt STL meshes with a focused native tool

description.p: SculptLite is a native Linux mesh sculpting application focused on direct, organic edits to STL models without a general-purpose modeling interface.
Import an STL mesh, shape it with focused sculpting brushes, optionally edit its surface, undo edits, and export the result as STL.
